lines.hearsay: Something at {place} got weighed twice, and the second weighing settled it.
lines.gossip: {A} put the sacks back on the scale at {place} with {B} standing over them, and {A} read the short weight out loud before {B} could — which is not a thing {A} has ever done in living memory, and {B} let it go at that.
lines.report: {A} entered a credit against {B}'s account for short weight at {place}, slot {slot}.
